subcodes.first_line: The Books, the Scriptures, the Scrolls and the Tablets have borne witness to the oneness of God and His singleness, to the sanctification of His Being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت الکتب و الزبر و الصحف و الالواح بوحدانیه الله و فردانیته و بتقدیس ذاته و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for opponents; enemies of the Faith, @praise and encouragement, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
